description: Creates custom Okta user profile attributes for identity lifecycle management and access governance. All attributes are sourced from the HR system (PROFILE_MASTER) and set to read-only.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No risk-profile-driven behavior — all attributes are the same across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: No risk-profile-driven behavior — all attributes are the same across profiles.
risk_profile_effects.strict: No risk-profile-driven behavior — all attributes are the same across profiles.

enable_employee_id.client_description: Whether to create the employee_id custom attribute. This is a unique identifier synced from your HR system, used for cross-system user correlation. Disable only if you already have an employee ID attribute configured outside Terraform.

enable_manager_email.client_description: Whether to create the manager_email custom attribute. Stores the direct manager's email for approval workflows and org hierarchy reporting.

enable_start_date.client_description: Whether to create the start_date custom attribute. Used for onboarding automation — pre-provisioning access before a user's first day.

enable_end_date.client_description: Whether to create the end_date custom attribute. Used for offboarding automation — scheduling deprovisioning when an employee leaves.

enable_office_location.client_description: Whether to create the office_location custom attribute. Stores the physical office location for location-based access policies and compliance reporting.

enable_risk_level.client_description: Whether to create the risk_level custom attribute. An enum (low/medium/high/critical) used to drive adaptive access policies — high-risk users can receive stricter authentication requirements.

enable_last_access_review_date.client_description: Whether to create the last_access_review_date custom attribute. Tracks when a user's access was last certified, supporting compliance audit requirements (SOX, SOC 2, etc.).

outputs.employee_id_index: Schema property index for employee_id (null if disabled)
outputs.manager_email_index: Schema property index for manager_email (null if disabled)
outputs.start_date_index: Schema property index for start_date (null if disabled)
outputs.end_date_index: Schema property index for end_date (null if disabled)
outputs.office_location_index: Schema property index for office_location (null if disabled)
outputs.risk_level_index: Schema property index for risk_level (null if disabled)
outputs.last_access_review_date_index: Schema property index for last_access_review_date (null if disabled)
outputs.all_enabled_attributes: List of enabled custom attribute names
